questions.question: Choose the correct word: The scientists ___ a new element.
questions.explanation: Elements are discovered (they already exist); not invented.

questions.question: Fill in: She has a ___ for classical music.
questions.explanation: A strong love for music is best described as 'passion'.

questions.question: Choose correctly: The judge ___ the verdict.
Fill in the blank: The company ___ bankruptcy last year.
questions.explanation: Filing for bankruptcy is the correct legal term.

questions.question: Choose: She ___ the examination with flying colors.
questions.explanation: Clearing an exam with flying colors = passing with high marks.

questions.question: Fill in: The government ___ a new policy on education.
Choose the right word: He ___ a great achievement.
questions.explanation: Accomplishing an achievement is the most precise usage.
